scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --alias:@esolang-battle/db=../../packages/db/src/index.ts --alias:@esolang-battle/common=../../packages/common/src/index.ts --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/index.js
